NUMBER 1 IN PORTABLE METROLOGY. GET YOUR FREE DEMO AND QUOTE NOW
GET A DEMO
What we offer
OUR SOLUTIONS
Casting & Forging
Measure your casted or forged part for excess material and align accordingly – wherever the part is. The system is set up where the part is, there is no need for an air-conditioned room or leveled floor. A Metronor system is both measurement and scribing system in one.
READ MORE
Energy Generation
The measurement environment in a production facility for windmill blades makes for the toughest conditions for any high-tech system. Metronor systems don’t have any air-intakes for cooling in the main components of the system, increasing longevity whilst still being operator-friendly.
READ MORE
Boresighting
With Harmolign, the boresight/harmonization process is simple: Power up the system computer, then follow the on-screen graphical guidance. The systems are fully MIL-STD and intended for use in operational environments.
READ MORE
Piping for Shipyards
Our measurement system is packaged to be taken onboard for the measurement of flanges and pipes. A design function lets you digitally construct a virtual pipe between two or more open connections which can later be built on the shop floor – no frame models needed.
READ MORE
Oil industry
A Metronor system has dual use in the oil industry. Measure pipes to be replaced or designed directly off-shore and send the data wirelessly to the production site. There, check the produced part for correctness – eliminating an iterative workflow with high transportation costs.
READ MORE
Orthopedic Navigation
Designed to simply add precision navigation to your current surgical procedures, Metronor’s orthopedic navigation system can be integrated into any planning and guidance software.
READ MORE
Fabrications
Large welded frames in pre-production or fixtures in the production line need to be measured and aligned as fast and accurate as possible. Metronor specialized in measuring large components whilst keeping the learning curve low, with a system that is quickly set up.
READ MORE
Aerospace
Measure and align moving parts on any area of an aircraft. Our visual, active tracking system lets you guide and control movements, helping you to understand and modify flexible components with

about.text:
About us - Metronor
Contact our HQ:
+47 6698 3800
info@metronor.com
About us
Home
About us
Our company
ABOUT METRONOR
Metronor is a privately held
ISO9001 certified
high technology company headquartered just outside Oslo, Norway. We have subsidiaries in  Wixom (MI, USA) and Munich (Germany), and a global network of partners and customers. Based on in-house innovation and research, we have since 1989 developed a range of electro-optical portable coordinate measuring systems that have become very popular among leading manufacturers worldwide. Metronor provides state-of-the-art Dimensional Management Solutions for complex assembly programs. Main products include Portable CMMs and Boresight systems.
Our core photogrammetric technology
developed into a variety of product versions, addressing the moderate to highest degree of accuracy requirements. We have expanded our product range to include custom products and solutions for MIL-STD 3DOF and 6DOF boresight applications in the military business area, besides the industrial metrology systems. A vast number of applications in various industries can be accurately and efficiently documented, providing the customer with excellent ROI from his investment.
You can read more about our ISO quality process and our technology on this page.
30 Years of portable metrology
COMPANY HISTORY
2025
New office in Asker
Metronor Industrial AS, Metronor Medtech AS, and Boresight and Alignment Solutions AS have relocated to new office premises at Gamle Borgenvei 3, 1383 Asker.
2023
Platinum Partnership with REVOLVE NTNU – Driving Innovation Together
We’re are Platinum Sponsors with REVOLVE NTNU, Norway’s leading student racing team.
As part of this exciting collaboration, we are supporting the team with our most advanced Metronor systems to help them reach the finish line—faster and more accurately than ever before.
2022
Company reorganization
Metronor reorganized into Metronor Industrial AS, Metronor Medtech AS and Boresight and Alignment Solutions AS
2019
OEM
Metronor starts providing technology and assemblies to OEM customers for integration into their products
2014
Medical market
Metronor enters medical market – initial multi-system contract signed.
2011
Military multi-systems
Initial multi-system boresight order for F-16.
2009
Energy market
Contract to equip all the 15 production facilities of the world’s largest wind turbine blade manufacturer with measurement systems and procedures.
2008
BAE Systems
Cooperation agreement signed with BAE Systems to develop and market boresight systems for US platforms.
2006
MSBU
Military boresight activity becomes separate business unit (MSBU).
2004
Entering the Military market
Metronor signs its initial military boresight contract.
1997
NASA
International Space Station modules from different countries documented and verified for fit by Boeing under contract to NASA.
1995
Opening a new location
Metronor Inc (USA) is established.
1993
Opening a new location
Metronor GmbH (Germany) is established.
1991
First deliveries
First system deliveries to SAAB Aircraft and Volvo Cars; believed to be the first portable measurement systems doing real-time comparison of measured data to CAD models.enim mollis non.
1989
Humble beginnings
Founded by Alf Pettersen and Øyvind Røtvold, both with background from NTNU and Saab Combitech.
